ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the city in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_types" (
  "project_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project type */,
  "project_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the project type (e.g., Surface, Elevated, Underground) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the project type (e.g., rail, bus, ferry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the project is located */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project type */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the project in millions of dollars */,
  "miles" REAL /* Length of the project in miles */,
  "cost_per_mile" REAL /* Cost per mile of the project */,
  "riders_2030" INTEGER /* Number of riders expected in 2030 */,
  "cost_per_rider_mile" REAL /* Cost per rider-mile */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Expected completion date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., proposed, in progress, completed) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the project (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_type_id") REFERENCES project_types ("project_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the cost is associated with */,
  "cost_type" TEXT /* Type of cost (e.g., construction, maintenance) */,
  "cost_amount" REAL /* Amount of the cost */,
  "cost_date" TEXT /* Date the cost was incurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cost */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_costs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ridership" (
  "ridership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ridership entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the ridership data is associated with */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the ridership data was collected */,
  "riders" INTEGER /* Number of riders for the given year */,
  "mode" TEXT /* Mode of transportation (e.g., rail, bus, ferry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ridership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ridership_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the document is associated with */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., project report, feasibility study) */,
  "document_file" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_documents_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., transportation planner, engineer, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the project */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was updated */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_updates_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was versioned */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_versions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_collaborators" (
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaborator */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the collaborator is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is the collaborator */,
  "collaborator_role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator (e.g., project lead, team member) */,
  "collaborator_status" TEXT /* Status of the collaborator (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaborator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_collaborators_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_collaborators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_meetings" (
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meeting */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the meeting is associated with */,
  "meeting_date" TEXT /* Date when the meeting was held */,
  "meeting_description" TEXT /* Description of the meeting */,
  "attendees" TEXT /* List of attendees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_meetings_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the action is associated with */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was taken */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "action_status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_actions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the report is associated with */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., progress, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_phases" (
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phase */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the phase is associated with */,
  "phase_name" TEXT /* Name of the phase */,
  "phase_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the phase */,
  "phase_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the phase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_phases_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_milestones" (
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each milestone */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the milestone is associated with */,
  "milestone_name" TEXT /* Name of the milestone */,
  "milestone_date" TEXT /* Date when the milestone is due */,
  "milestone_status" TEXT /* Status of the milestone (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_milestones_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_risks" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the risk is associated with */,
  "risk_name" TEXT /* Name of the risk */,
  "risk_description" TEXT /* Description of the risk */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Level of the risk (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_risks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the issue is associated with */,
  "issue_name" TEXT /* Name of the issue */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "issue_status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_issues_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
